source_milestone: R15 Knowledge Base, Agent Identity, Memory, and RACI Foundations

state_model.description: Raw work item captured from operator or user request and awaiting PM refinement.
Work item is being shaped into acceptance criteria, bounded scope, and evidence needs.
Work item has enough bounded scope and evidence requirements to start implementation.
Scoped implementation or documentation work is underway from an explicit card or task reference.
Developer-facing work is complete enough to request independent QA review.
QA is validating implementation evidence and acceptance criteria.
QA found failures that require rework before audit.
QA has a pass recommendation with evidence refs, pending audit.
Evidence auditor is checking proof sufficiency and non-claim boundaries.
Audit found evidence or claim gaps that require rework or refinement.
Audit accepts evidence sufficiency for requesting user approval.
User approval is required before closeout readiness can advance.
User approval exists and release or closeout evidence can be assembled.
Work item is closed only after user approval, audit evidence, and release or closeout evidence.
Work item is rejected or cancelled by user authority after preserving a state change record.

prohibited_transitions.reason: Active states cannot jump to closed without approved_for_closeout, user approval, audit accepted state, and release evidence.
Closed work items cannot silently re-enter active work in the R15-006 model.
QA evidence alone cannot close a card.
Audit blockers must route to rework or refinement, not closure.
non_claims: no release closeout without audit accepted state

prohibited_transitions.reason: Implementation evidence requires QA, audit, user approval, and closeout evidence before closure.
Status posture marking R15-007 or later complete fails closed during R15-006.

separation_of_duties_rules.description: user_rodney is final approval authority for closeout, cancellation, and other user-approval-required transitions.
project_manager may plan and coordinate but must not implement code or own final QA for that work.
developer may implement only when bounded_card_ref and task_packet_ref are required evidence.
qa_test_agent may validate but must not test its own implementation as final QA.
evidence_auditor may audit evidence but must not implement fixes or product changes.
release_closeout_agent may recommend closeout but must not close without user approval.
No role may self-approve transitions where no_self_approval is required.
No role may impersonate another role or claim another role performed work.
No role may close a card without required evidence and approval chain.

invalid_state_rules.description: missing required states fails closed in the R15-006 validator.
duplicate states fails closed in the R15-006 validator.
missing required transitions fails closed in the R15-006 validator.
duplicate transition ids fails closed in the R15-006 validator.
closed without user approval rejected fails closed in the R15-006 validator.
developer accountable for qa pass rejected fails closed in the R15-006 validator.
qa as implementer for final qa rejected fails closed in the R15-006 validator.
auditor as implementer rejected fails closed in the R15-006 validator.
pm as code implementer rejected fails closed in the R15-006 validator.
release closeout without audit accepted rejected fails closed in the R15-006 validator.
missing accountable agent rejected fails closed in the R15-006 validator.
missing responsible agent rejected fails closed in the R15-006 validator.
runtime state machine claim rejected fails closed in the R15-006 validator.
board routing runtime claim rejected fails closed in the R15-006 validator.
card reentry implementation claim rejected fails closed in the R15-006 validator.
actual agent runtime claim rejected fails closed in the R15-006 validator.
r16 opening claim rejected fails closed in the R15-006 validator.
r15 007 plus complete status rejected fails closed in the R15-006 validator.

claims: R15-006 defines a machine-checkable RACI and state-transition matrix model for AIOffice work items.

R15-006 defines role authority, evidence, prohibited transitions, approval requirements, QA evidence requirements, audit evidence requirements, and fail-closed transition rules as governance data only.
non_claims: no actual agents implemented by R15-006
no direct agent access runtime implemented
no classification or re-entry dry run executed
no final R15 proof package complete
